mapper.select: SELECT id, agent_id, memory, memory_hash, parent_id, create_time, update_time, user_id FROM long_term_memory WHERE agent_id = #{agentId} ORDER BY parent_id ASC NULLS FIRST, id ASC

SELECT id, agent_id, memory, memory_hash, parent_id, create_time, update_time, user_id FROM long_term_memory WHERE agent_id = #{agentId} AND user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY parent_id ASC NULLS FIRST, id ASC
SELECT id, agent_id, memory, memory_hash, parent_id, create_time, update_time, user_id FROM long_term_memory WHERE agent_id = #{agentId} AND parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, agent_id, memory, memory_hash, parent_id, create_time, update_time, user_id FROM long_term_memory WHERE agent_id = #{agentId} AND user_id=#{userId} AND parent_id is NULL ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, agent_id, memory, memory_hash, parent_id, create_time, update_time, user_id FROM long_term_memory WHERE agent_id = #{agentId} AND memory_hash = #{hash} limit 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO long_term_memory (agent_id, memory, memory_hash, parent_id, user_id, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{agentId}, #{memory}, #{memoryHash}, #{parentId}, #{userId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
SELECT last_insert_rowid()
mapper.update: UPDATE long_term_memory SET memory = #{memory}, memory_hash = #{memoryHash}, parent_id = #{parentId}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
